devnet_status.highlight: ePBS DevNet 1 broken since launch; DevNet 2 planned after beacon state changes
BalDevNet 3 launched Wednesday; Geth/Nethermind forked on gas accounting disagreement
State gas reservoir overflow: clients disagree treating borrowed gas as state vs regular

bal_devnet_planning.highlight: BalDevNet 4 spec created; 2-3 issues for DevNet 3, remainder require DevNet 4
Points 3-6 in design doc need discussion; current spec may not be final
EIP-7976 and EIP-7981 proposed for BalDevNet 4
EIP-2780 (transaction base cost breakdown) proposed; affects every transaction

epbs_technical.highlight: Proposed: EPBS range sync without requesting payloads for finalized sections
Removing payload state transition enables CL-only range sync; much faster catchup
Risk: could client sync through finalized invalid block without payload validation?
Nethermind validates by replaying all blocks from network during range sync

action_items.action: Discuss EIP-8037 clarifications in breakout room
Write up EPBS range sync proposal for EL team review
Review range sync security implications async

decisions.decision: Prefer stability over adding EIP-2780 to BalDevNet 4 before interop
Include EIP-7976 and EIP-7981 in BalDevNet 4 (simple data EIPs)
Re-evaluate EIP-2780 inclusion next Monday after test/implementation assessment

targets.target: April 29th - Latest BalDevNet 4 launch (prefer before interop)
